title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
